evals.prompt: Build a 90-day onboarding program for new account executives. We're a mid-market B2B SaaS company with a 20-person sales team, $40K ACV, using MEDDPICC methodology. We have Seismic Learning for enablement and Gong for call recording. New AEs currently take 6+ months to hit quota and we want to cut that in half. Give me the full program with milestones, assessments, and a way to measure if it's working.
evals.expected_output: Complete 30-60-90 onboarding program with phase milestones, assessments, role-play exercises, and ramp metrics

assertions.name: thirty_sixty_ninety
assertions.description: Provides a 30-60-90 day framework with specific milestones per phase (Learn, Practice, Perform) and clear transition criteria between phases

assertions.name: practice_exercises
assertions.description: Includes role-play and practice exercises (not just classroom training) — shadowing, live call practice, objection handling drills

assertions.name: ramp_metrics
assertions.description: Defines measurable ramp metrics including time to first deal, quota attainment targets, and assessment pass rates to track onboarding effectiveness

evals.prompt: Create a coaching framework for frontline sales managers who have never coached before. We have 6 managers each leading teams of 8-10 reps. The managers were all promoted from top-performing IC roles and have no formal coaching training. They currently do ad-hoc 1:1s with no structure. We need a repeatable coaching system they can follow. We use Gong for call recordings but no dedicated enablement platform.
evals.expected_output: Structured coaching framework with 1:1 cadence, coaching models, and manager enablement plan

assertions.name: coaching_cadence
assertions.description: Recommends a structured 1:1 coaching cadence (weekly recommended) with specific time allocation for pipeline review, skill coaching, and goal setting

assertions.name: coaching_model
assertions.description: Introduces a specific coaching model (GROW, SBI, or Ask-Tell-Ask) with explanation of how to apply it in sales coaching conversations

assertions.name: manager_enablement
assertions.description: Includes a manager enablement component (coaching the coaches) — recognizing that promoted ICs need training on how to coach before they can coach others

evals.prompt: We use Seismic Learning and want to set up AI role-plays for our sales team to practice handling objections. Our top 5 objections are price, competitor comparison, implementation timeline, security concerns, and 'we already have a solution.' We have 30 reps and 4 managers. How do I set this up end to end — the scenarios, scoring, and tracking?
evals.expected_output: Seismic Learning role-play setup guide with AI Role-Play Agent configuration, scenarios, scoring rubric, and performance tracking

assertions.name: ai_roleplay_agent
assertions.description: References Seismic's AI Role-Play Agent and explains how it simulates buyer conversations for practice without needing a live partner

assertions.name: practice_setup
assertions.description: Explains how to create practice exercises with specific objection scenarios and a scoring rubric for evaluating rep responses

assertions.name: tracking_correlation
assertions.description: Recommends tracking completion rates, practice scores, and correlating learning metrics with actual sales performance outcomes
